content.speakerText: I'm aiming to wrap up by the end of this week. Do you think that’s feasible?
content.speakerTextCn: 我计划这周末前结束工作，你觉得可行吗？
expectedAnswers: That works—we can finalize everything by Friday.
Actually, we’d prefer if you stayed until next Monday for the client handover.
Thanks for giving notice early; we’ll arrange the transition plan this week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了离职时间的可行性或提出替代方案
语言准确性：语法结构和时态是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了职场常用表达如 wrap up / handover / finalize
关键词覆盖：是否包含 transition / handover / feasible / wrap up 等核心词汇
